summary: Iteration 61 - Multi-tenant ERP Blueprint Testing COMPLETE. All 18 tests PASSED. Blueprint v2.0.0 synchronized across all 8 ocb_* tenants. User creation includes role_id and role_code. Tenant switch and user login flows working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: tenant_blueprint.py: sync_all_tenants() correctly initializes all ocb_* databases with blueprint 2.0.0
users.py: create_user now includes role_id lookup from roles collection and role_code assignment
business.py: switch endpoint uses runtime DB switching (set_active_db_name) without restart
seed_data_creation: Created test users: test_iter61_* for user creation tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-tenant ERP system fully functional. Blueprint 2.0.0 active across all tenants. Key workflow: 1) Switch tenant via /api/business/switch/{db_name}, 2) Login to get token for that tenant, 3) Use token for operations in that tenant.

user_creation_with_role_id.details: New users have role_id and role_code set correctly

new_user_login.details: Both existing test user and newly created users can login to tenant
